description: Triggers when the user wants to scrape websites, reverse-engineer layouts, extract design tokens, analyze competitor sites, or clone page structure using Playwright
should_trigger: Scrape this competitor's landing page and extract the color palette and font stack
Reverse engineer the navbar component structure from this SaaS website
Clone this website's HTML and assets for offline analysis
Analyze this site to identify what CSS framework and UI library they're using
Extract the design system tokens (colors, spacing, typography) from this site
Write a Playwright script to scrape product data from this e-commerce site
should_not_trigger: Audit my own site's SEO performance
Scrape my own CMS API for data migration
Set up monitoring for my website uptime
Create a web crawler for indexing my blog
